topics.label: Setup & valac
topics.description: Install Vala compiler. Vala compiles to C via GObject, giving native performance.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: int, string, bool, double, arrays, and GLib types. C#-like syntax.

topics.label: Classes & GObject
topics.description: Classes inherit from GLib.Object. Properties, signals, and GObject introspection.

topics.label: Interfaces & Generics
topics.description: interface keyword and generic types <T>. Familiar from C#/Java.

topics.label: Signals & Lambda
topics.description: GObject signals with connect(). Lambda syntax () => {}.

topics.label: Memory Management
topics.description: Reference counting (not GC). Weak references with weak keyword.

topics.label: Async/Yield
topics.description: async methods and yield for asynchronous I/O with GLib main loop.

topics.label: Meson Build
topics.description: Build Vala projects with Meson. The standard build system for GNOME.
